scripts.dev: start cmd /k "npm run dev --prefix backend" & start cmd /k "npm run dev --prefix patient-app" & start cmd /k "npm run dev --prefix therapist-app" & start cmd /k "npm run dev --prefix admin-panel"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix patient-app && npm install --prefix therapist-app && npm install --prefix admin-panel
